title: The Black Cat Plushies
description: A Plushie pack provided by The Black Cat on TTRP. Created by VekosVibes with shop staff donating time to help as well!
body:
![theblackcat](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/aa5eefe5e2db8f3fd5fff888a4544df9b0de93b9.png)
![plushiepack](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/16eb58b439a6fe660249c4f59be43e7786af4ab3.png)
# _The Black Cats Original TTRP Plushie Pack!_
A plushie pack made for TTRP, featuring various characters from the roleplay server also including, custom, requested, and event versions. _Put together so we could share around little versions of our friends :3_

![variantcit](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5dba472e900380d793aba5b15487e2694112916a.png)
The mod Variant CIT is needed in order to see the textures!
https://modrinth.com/mod/variants-cit

> Want a plushie? Apply here!: https://forms.gle/vimYADBB7LnX1eon9
- [DO NOT Sell plushies without permission. recreation of plushies is not allowed unless it is for personal use only.]
- [All future plushies come in with the next update]
### Plushie Total: 111

> Plushie makers:
- *Creator Vekos: 95*
- Wide: 45
- Slim: 49
- Slim W/ Block: 1
- *Bri: 16*
- Wide: 5
- Slim: 11

**Different Expansions!**
- Creator Plushie Expansion
- Template Expansion
- Staff Plushie Expansion
- Player Plushie Expansion
- Adventurers Guild Plushie Expansion
- The Black Cat Plushie Expansion
- Blooming Bakes Plushie Expansion
- Duck Plushie Expansion
